title: Crispy Russian Cabbage Stir‑fry
description: A light, savory stir‑fry featuring crisp cabbage, sweet carrot, and seasoned with sunflower oil and a touch of soy sauce for a subtle Russian twist.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, garlic powder, ground ginger, paprika, salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper to create the sauce.
Heat a large skillet or wok over medium‑high heat and add sunflower oil until shimmering.
Add sliced onion and julienned carrot; stir‑fry for 2–3 minutes until the onion begins to soften.
Add shredded cabbage and continue to stir‑fry for 3–4 minutes, keeping the mixture moving so the cabbage remains crisp.
Pour the prepared sauce over the vegetables and sprinkle with sesame seeds; toss to coat evenly.
Cook for an additional 1–2 minutes to meld flavors, checking seasoning and adjusting salt or pepper if desired.
Remove from heat, transfer to a serving dish, and serve immediately while hot.
Optionally, give a quick squeeze of fresh lemon juice or sprinkle a pinch of crushed chili flakes for extra brightness.
